arts.ttl: Everton, Liverpool and Slot charged after derby melee
arts.sum: Everton, Liverpool and Arne Slot are charged by the Football Association after incidents at the end of Wednesday's Merseyside derby at Goodison Park.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace v Everton: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 5.30pm GMT kick-off Live scores | Top scorers | Latest tables | And mail Emillia The teams are out under the lights at Selhurst Park. Kick-off is just moments away! During his pre-match press conference, Everton manager David Moyes said: “Over recent years, everybody’s brought Everton back down to Earth. So, why don’t we try to keep Everton high for a wee while? Isn’t it good there’s positive talk about Everton for a change. We’re getting great support, people behind us. Continue reading...

On a cold Saturday morning at the Avant Training Centre, Crystal Palace Under-18s fell to a 4-1 defeat against Norwich City.

arts.ttl: Club not put off by Crystal Palace’s €50m asking price – Star on list as they plan for summer
arts.sum: Atlético Madrid have put Crystal Palace striker Jean-Philippe Mateta on their shortlist and aren’t put off by a €50m asking price. That’s according to Fichajes.net, who report that the Spanish side are already aware of Crystal Palace’s asking price and not put off by it. arts.ttl: Everton predicted lineup vs Crystal Palace as Moyes forced into changes
arts.sum: A depleted Everton team travel to south London to take on Crystal Palace in the Premier League this weekend. David Moyes’ men arrive at Selhurst Park buoyed by their 2-2 draw with Liverpool in the last ever Merseyside Derby at Goodison Park.
